title: FunctionConfiguration
description: A Lambda function's configuration and metadata

Runtime.description: The identifier of the function's runtime. Runtime is required if the deployment package is a .zip file archive.

Handler.description: The function entrypoint in your code. The format includes the file name without extension and the handler function name (e.g. index.handler)

CodeSize.description: The size of the function's deployment package in bytes

Timeout.description: The amount of time in seconds that Lambda allows a function to run before stopping it. Maximum is 900 seconds (15 minutes).

MemorySize.description: The amount of memory available to the function at runtime in MB. Lambda allocates CPU power in proportion to the amount of memory configured.

LastModified.description: The date and time the function was last updated in ISO 8601 format

CodeSha256.description: The SHA-256 hash of the function's deployment package

Version.description: The version of the Lambda function

KMSKeyArn.description: The ARN of the KMS key used to encrypt the function's environment variables at rest

MasterArn.description: For Lambda@Edge functions, the ARN of the main function

RevisionId.description: The latest updated revision of the function

State.description: The current state of the function

StateReason.description: The reason for the function's current state

StateReasonCode.description: The reason code for the function's current state

LastUpdateStatus.description: The status of the last update that was performed on the function

LastUpdateStatusReason.description: The reason for the last update that was performed on the function

LastUpdateStatusReasonCode.description: The reason code for the last update

ImageConfigResponse.description: The function's image configuration values for container images

Architectures.description: The instruction set architecture that the function supports

EphemeralStorage.description: The size of the function's /tmp directory in MB

SnapStart.description: The function's SnapStart setting for reducing cold start latency

RuntimeVersionConfig.description: The ARN of the runtime and any errors that occurred

LoggingConfig.description: The function's Amazon CloudWatch Logs configuration
